reviews.review_title: I kept saying it had potential
reviews.review_description: Two months back when I got this game I was very excited to play it because I was very into squid game, but then when I came in, it was a laggy mess whenever I first came in there were two jump ropes and one didn’t even work. There was a red light green light and it’s still rigged to this day. I can never make it past the cookie game for two reasons. There’s either not enough players to go play tug-of-war or I end up dying the glass bridge if you do make it to glass bridge is very very horrible and laggy. It’s my favorite game in the whole series and they messed it up by not fixing the panels so now in previous day they got rid of all the jump rope and all of basically the good stuff and then they added the cookie game and tug-of-war which by the way, since it’s a very dead game, you can barely even go into tug-of-war and they got rid of the free gameplay. See if you’re bored then you can’t just skip to jump rope anymore. You have to go through the whole series which doesn’t even have jump rope anymore and I would keep cheering this on except for the fact that I’m pretty sure the developer gave up he was updating the game at least every week and it’s been a month or two since he’s updated last I think he’s abandoned this game so for anyone who’s going to make it wants to review on this don’t even bother because he got rid of this game and he’s not gonna fix anything and there’s already enough for you saying how bad it is ￼ and the developer can win as much as he wants that he’s a minor and he can’t pay $500 but I found his account on YouTube and he sounds like he’s 17 years old he was bragging about how it’s going to be the most realistic, squid game VR game ever and obviously he did not keep to his word and also I forgot to put after glass bridge there’s nothing you just have to jump off the platform he probably has a full-time job and he can definitely pay to make this game better and make it the a.k.a. best squid game VR game but right now it’s just a laggy mess everywhere you walk you can’t see 3 inches in front of you and your arms are spread out like that one dude you see at crunch fitness￼￼￼

lets get something straight this game is so laggy and no matter how many times the developer complains about how he doesn't have the money to spend on it that's his fault if you don't have the money to make a proper game then don't make the game and now it cost $5 this game is nowhere near ready to be done should have waited longer to make this game guys go play monkathon it's so much better and this game will never be the best br squid game

Bugs everywhere the modes don’t even work ￼ plus red light green light is rigged because I cannot move and I keep pressing my buttons and nothing‘s happening glass bridge takes me back to spawn add more games there’s barely any it’s so bad do not play it ￼￼￼￼

reviews.review_description: This game is one of a kind; there are no other vr squid games available! With lots of minigames, great performance (coming from a quest 2 user) and well made maps, this up-and-coming game will greatly exceed your expectations, with frequent updates and an incredibly nice dev! 5 stars!
